home.hero_subtitle: Upload your course, EduTutor generates 10 MCQ questions, corrects you, and identifies your gaps. All on your machine, open source.
home.feature_upload_desc: PDF ≤ 5 MB or pasted text. Everything stays local on your machine.
home.feature_gen_desc: Llama 3.1 8B via Ollama. No paid APIs, no data leaks.

upload.title: Create a new Quiz
upload.subtitle: Upload a PDF or paste text. EduTutor AI generates 10 MCQ questions.
upload.placeholder_text: Paste your course text here (at least 200 charactersL)…
upload.loading_gen: ⏳ Generating… (1 to 5 min on CPU, please wait)
upload.footer_gen_info: Generation may take 1 to 5 minutes depending on your machine (much faster with a GPU or a smaller model).
